truthBoundary: Pixel-faithful visual proof: both Current and Enhanced are read-only 127.0.0.1:8770 renders of the same current public Arc Guard HTML, theme, navigation, assets, media, and embeds. Current uses ?view=original; Enhanced uses ?view=enhanced and adds only the local facelift layer. No request can write to WordPress.

browserEventPolicy: Console/page events from current public WordPress, Elementor, embeds, and upstream preview-proxy resources are preserved per render as non-gating observations. The pass gate uses deterministic markup, scope, H1, overflow, media, noindex/no-cache, containment/connectivity, overlap, route-specific, and exact FAQ assertions.

supplementalFinalAudit.method: Fresh final-code enhanced runtime pass at both 1440x1200 and 390x844 after final screenshots; checks introTextFits, media containment/connectivity, overlap, overflow, exact H1, Product patent eyebrow+hero copy, and response no-cache.
